summary: Classified the obsolete closed representative as historical only. The current canonical family is open issue #38066 with open implementation PR #38255. Open PR #49135 is related Telegram streaming work but covers a different block-streaming coalescing/message-splitting root cause, so no close/comment/label mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Keep the underlying issue open as the canonical user-visible report until #38255 or an equivalent maintainer-approved implementation lands.
